conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm setting up observability for our platform. I need to decide on a logging solution: Datadog, the ELK stack, or Grafana Loki.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Datadog is excellent but very expensive at our log volume.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: ELK is powerful but operationally heavy — we've had painful experiences running Elasticsearch.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Grafana Loki is cheaper and we already use Grafana for metrics, so it would unify our dashboards.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For tracing I'm going to use Jaeger regardless of what I pick for logs.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Final call: Loki for logs because of cost and the Grafana integration, Jaeger for traces.

query: What did the user decide to use for log aggregation?
